title: Ruins of the Past
description: Datapack which overhauls archeology, pottery, and adds runes!
body:
## Fixed Buugs :D

**Adds mysterious ancient structures, a full pottery system, and rune crafting to your survival world!** This datapack introduces new structures to explore, functional blocks to craft with, and a deep pottery & rune system to master. **Since this is a Datapack and Resource pack, both can be installed once server side and will apply to all players that join, voiding the need for each player to install the pack!** > ### Forgotten Structures > - *Explore 3 mysterious structures scattered across your world!* > > - **Mayan Temple** – A jungle pyramid filled with traps and loot > > - **The Crypt** – An underground tomb with new pottery sherds > > - **Desert Dig Site** – An archaeological site where you can discover ancient tablets > ### New Blocks > - *Craft & discover 5 new functional blocks!* > > - **Pedestal** – Display your items, and dye it to match your style > > - **Runestone** – A decorative block > > - **Research Workbench** – Analyze ancient tablets to discover runes or structure maps > > - **Pottery Wheel** – Craft brand new pottery > > - **Runic Altar** – Imbue items with runes using XP > ### Pottery System > - *Create pots with form and function!* > > - 6 base pot types: Thin, Small, Square, Large, Vase, and Slab > > - Dye system with 32 colors > > - Sherds on all 4 sides, with brand new sherds to collect > > - Crafted using bundles, reinforced bundles, Eye of Ender, TNT, and more > ### Rune Crafting > - *Research tablets and apply powerful runes!* > > - Ancient Tablets can be researched to unlock runes or reveal maps to structures > > - Use the Runic Altar to apply runes to items (1 rune per item, permanent) > > - XP is consumed through the transcriber system #### Q. How do I download the pack? > #### A. Install the datapack in the vanilla world creation menu! ¹ #### Q. I cant find the resource pack! > #### A. Go to the Versions tab, find the **datapack** version you want and click the name, then scroll to the bottom and install the resource pack. ² #### Q. The Transcriber / Rune system feels incomplete? > #### A. The Transcriber is still being actively reworked and will receive updated mechanics in future versions! #### Q. I experienced a bug, what do I do? > #### A. Join the Discord and file a bug report :D
¹ How To Download! Data Pack: 1. Click the latest Datapack version. 2. Scroll down and Download the Primary file. 3. If you want to create a World, go to Singleplayer > Create New World > Data Packs > Open Pack Folder. (It is not recommended to put it in an already existing world!) 4. Copy/Cut and Paste the downloaded file there. 5. Open/Create your world. 6. Note: You need to also install the Required Resource Pack. Required Resource Pack: 1. Click the Datapack featured version. 2. Scroll down and Download the Required Resource Pack. 3. Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder. 4. Copy/Cut and Paste the downloaded file there. 5. Activate the Resource Pack. (you can reload the resources with f3+t ingame) ## See image below for reference ![Image for reference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfa9150deed9ee84ced125388f9aca2249c1ee71.png)
² How to get Resource Pack! ![How To Download (Click versions tab, click version, scroll to bottom, click download)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8788d805b2426f5fe0de6a1b465a46645c811be.gif)
* Release Dates #### There is no SET date for update releases, join the discord for more info!
Cool / Semi Secret Advancement Stack a dyed **Pedestal** on top of itself 4 times to unlock a cool advancement.
